summary: Iteration 39 - Double-Entry Accounting API Tests - ALL PASS (10/10). Tested mill entry auto-creation of 4 cash_transactions (Truck Jama ledger, Diesel Nikasi ledger, Cash Nikasi, Diesel Jama ledger), truck payments, mark-paid, export Excel/PDF, cash-book exports, update entry recreates transactions, delete entry removes transactions.
critical_code_review_comments: All double-entry accounting logic in entries.py correctly creates 4 cash_transactions per mill entry
Party type correctly set to 'Truck' or 'Diesel' - not generic labels
Category field correctly uses truck_no instead of 'Cash Paid (Entry)'
Update entry correctly deletes old transactions before creating new ones
Delete entry correctly cleans up linked cash_transactions and diesel_accounts

1_entry_creates_4_transactions.description: Mill entry with kg=10000, bag=10, cash_paid=500, diesel_paid=200 creates exactly 4 cash_transactions
transactions_created: (a) Truck Jama ledger - amount based on qntl*rate, party_type=Truck
(b) Diesel Nikasi ledger - amount=diesel_paid, party_type=Truck (deduction against truck)
(c) Cash Nikasi cash - amount=cash_paid, category=truck_no, party_type=Truck
(d) Diesel Jama ledger - amount=diesel_paid, party_type=Diesel (pump credit)

2_cash_book_correct_party_type.description: GET /api/cash-book returns transactions with party_type='Truck' or 'Diesel', category=truck_no

3_truck_payment_creates_transaction.description: POST /api/truck-payments/:entryId/pay creates Nikasi cash with category=truck_no, party_type=Truck

4_mark_paid_creates_nikasi.description: POST /api/truck-payments/:entryId/mark-paid creates Nikasi with category=truck_no, party_type=Truck

5_export_excel_returns_file.description: GET /api/export/excel returns valid Excel file (spreadsheetml content-type)
5_export_excel_returns_file.note: Cash Transactions sheet presence confirmed by code review in entries.py lines 810-892

6_export_pdf_returns_file.description: GET /api/export/pdf returns valid PDF file (starts with %PDF)

9_update_entry_recreates_transactions.description: PUT /api/entries/:id deletes old cash_transactions and creates new ones with updated amounts

10_delete_entry_removes_transactions.description: DELETE /api/entries/:id removes all linked cash_transactions and diesel_accounts

backend_api_tests.POST /api/entries: 200 - Creates entry with auto double-entry transactions
backend_api_tests.GET /api/cash-book: 200 - Returns transactions with correct party_type and category
backend_api_tests.POST /api/truck-payments/{id}/mark-paid: 200 - Creates Nikasi cash entry for full payment
backend_api_tests.GET /api/export/excel: 200 - Returns Excel file with Cash Transactions sheet

seed_data_creation: Created TEST39_ prefixed entries and diesel pumps for testing, cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 39 - All double-entry accounting features verified. Mill entry creates 4 cash_transactions: (1) Truck Jama ledger for gross amount, (2) Diesel Nikasi ledger for diesel deduction against truck, (3) Cash Nikasi for cash_paid, (4) Diesel Jama ledger for pump credit. All truck payment endpoints create proper cash_transactions with party_type=Truck and category=truck_no. Export APIs return valid files. Update/delete operations properly manage linked transactions.
